name: ERDL Skeleton Proposal
about: Propose a new industry ERDL skeleton
title: "[ERDL Skeleton] <Industry Name>"

---

## Industry Overview

- **Industry**: [e.g., Healthcare, Logistics, Education]
- **Why this industry needs an ERDL skeleton**: [2-3 sentences]

## Scope

What entities, rules, and workflows would this skeleton cover?

```
Example entities:
- Patient
- Appointment
- Prescription
- InsuranceClaim
```

## Your Expertise

- **Years in this industry**: [e.g., 10+]
- **Role**: [e.g., practitioner, consultant, developer, domain expert]
- **Relevant systems you've worked with**: [e.g., HIS, SAP Healthcare]

## Proposed Timeline

When could you start contributing? [e.g., immediately, Q3 2026, exploring]
